title: Creepy's Hat
description: Resource pack that add Creepy from the Nioum's shorts! That's just a creeper with a diamond helmet-pickaxe.
body:
Hey! That's Creepy, from the Nioum's short lore! 

![That's Creepy!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1820388b32241ab5f22264201eedbcf433ec298e_0.webp)

# FEATURES
- Rename a nametag to "Creepy" then put it on a random creeper you see in the supermarket... Et poof! 
- Give yourself the Creepy's hat with that command: /give @s minecraft:carved_pumpkin{CustomModelData:1}

![Rename a nametag to "Creepy" with the Anvil!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c413a7b1aef1140237498425564611f043a660a.png)
![...Hey! It's me with the Creepy's hat!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7255f51f188a55581e4abc6e1d87e0b72278be97_0.webp)
